name: com.company.build-pipeline
description: Neutral, reusable Unity CI/CD build pipeline toolkit. Provides layered config loading, validation rules, platform builders, and hooks. Install this package in your consumer project so the workflow toolkit can invoke Company.BuildPipeline.Editor.BuildCommand.Execute as the Unity -executeMethod. The package name (com.company.build-pipeline) and execute-method (Company.BuildPipeline.Editor.BuildCommand.Execute) are stable, documented identifiers — do not rename them in the consumer project.
